revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-350

A device which detects changes in visibility (2-1-275) and can be used to control aids to navigation when the visibility falls below a defined threshold.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Fog detector}}
